summary: PR 2537 advances matching in src/melee/if/ifstatus by replacing several NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs with C for HUD percent/damage/status behavior, adding needed includes, and adjusting ifstatus headers/types. The bot report records 4 new matches in main/melee/if/ifstatus, several further ifstatus improvements, plus two broken matches and one .sdata2 regression.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation work: added includes, implemented HUD damage/status functions, adjusted animation/digit update logic, and used HSD/GObj/JObj/TObj helpers.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ifStatus_802F4B84 replaced NOT_IMPLEMENTED with digit shake logic
diff_excerpt: ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F61FC signatures changed from void stubs to implemented functions
text_corpus issue_comment: 4 new matches and ifstatus improvements reported

key_files.role: Header/prototype updates corresponding to recovered ifstatus function signatures.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: function signatures in ifstatus.c changed for ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F61FC

key_files.role: Type definition adjustments used by recovered ifstatus code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: recovered code uses IfDamageState, HudIndex fields, damage flags, jobjs, translation_x/y, damage_percent, old_damage

what_changed.text: Implemented ifStatus_802F4B84 with frame-based digit shake logic, random offsets via offset_rand/HSD_Randf, clamped shake magnitude, JObj translate restore/update, and PAD_STACK(8).
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: ifStatus_802F4B84 reported as new 100.00% match

what_changed.text: Reworked ifStatus_802F4EDC around HUD player lookup, death/explode animation handling, digit texture animation setup, hide/show flags for tens/hundreds, and color interpolation/application to digit materials.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: ifStatus_802F4EDC improved from 71.92% to 80.38%

what_changed.text: Added static inline find_player_by_entity and implemented ifStatus_802F5B48 to update damage/HP values, clamp to 0..0x3E7, set force_digit_shake/unk10 flags, and trigger related status functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: ifStatus_802F5B48 reported as new 100.00% match

what_changed.text: Implemented ifStatus_802F5EC0 to create/setup HUD GObj/JObj when missing, attach GX/proc callbacks, load animations, position HUD via ifAll_802F3424, cache digit JObjs and translations, initialize percent texture animation, and call update paths.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: ifStatus_802F5EC0 improved from 0.77% to 95.20%

what_changed.text: Implemented much of ifStatus_802F61FC for player mark setup using GObj/JObj creation, HSD_ASSERTREPORT checks, animation loading, player character/team/color data, and HUD object fields.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: ifStatus_802F61FC improved from 0.72% to 96.36%

what_changed.text: Updated ifstatus headers/types in small hunks, likely to align declarations and structure fields with the recovered bodies.

smart_moves.text: Used typed HSD and HUD structures for many accesses rather than raw offset arithmetic, including state->jobjs, state->translation_x/y, flags fields, HudIndex animation pointers, and JObj/TObj/MObj chains.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: IfDamageState and HudIndex field accesses throughout ifStatus_802F4B84, ifStatus_802F4EDC, ifStatus_802F5EC0

smart_moves.text: Kept fixed-size repeated digit work explicit where needed for matching, while also using for loops for simple repeated operations such as restoring/updating four digit translations and searching six HUD players.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: for (i = 0; i < 4; i++) in ifStatus_802F4B84 and ifStatus_802F5EC0
diff_excerpt: for (i = 0; i < 6; i++) in ifStatus_802F4EDC and find_player_by_entity

smart_moves.text: Mapped GObj/JObj setup to existing helper APIs and includes instead of local undeclared calls: GObj_Create, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_GObj_SetupProc, HSD_JObjLoadJoint, lb_8000C07C.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: added includes for ifcoget, lb_00F9, lbaudio_ax, gobjgxlink, gobjobject, gobjproc

smart_moves.text: Used HSD_ASSERTREPORT for recovered error paths in ifStatus_802F61FC rather than leaving raw assert/report expansion in the excerpted code.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For HUD/status decompilation, recover and use subsystem structs and helper APIs first; the PR shows substantial progress by expressing behavior through IfDamageState, HudIndex, HSD_JObj/HSD_TObj/HSD_MObj, GObj setup helpers, and player APIs.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: multiple ifstatus functions improved or matched

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small header/type edits should accompany recovered function bodies when signatures or fields become known; this PR changed ifstatus.h and types.h alongside C implementations.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: several function signatures changed from void(void) stubs to typed parameters

decomp_lessons.lesson: A matching PR can still introduce neighboring or data regressions; intake should record bot-reported broken matches and section regressions instead of treating new function matches as the whole result.

naming_conventions.text: Address-style global function names were retained for unknown ifstatus functions, e.g. ifStatus_802F4B84, ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F61FC.
Clear short local role names were used for HSD/HUD objects: state, hud, gobj, jobj, digit_jobj, tobj, mobj, vec.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: local declarations in ifStatus_802F4EDC, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F61FC

naming_conventions.text: A semantic helper name find_player_by_entity was introduced for the repeated HUD_parent_entity lookup.
Some placeholder or uncertain names remain, such as unk9, unk10, unk258, unk268, unk26C, unk270, and new_var, indicating semantics were not fully proven in this slice.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ifStatus_802F5B48 uses p->unk9 and p->flags.unk10
diff_excerpt: ifStatus_802F5EC0/61FC use hud->unk258, unk268, unk26C, unk270

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in implemented or improved functions: PAD_STACK(8), PAD_STACK(96), PAD_STACK(0x18), and PAD_STACK(0x10) appear in the excerpt.
Fixed-count for loops were used for known HUD array sizes: 4 digit JObjs and 6 player HUD states.
Animation resource selection was expressed with explicit child/next/aobjdesc/fobjdesc pointer chains to reach HSD_TexAnim data used by HSD_TObjAddAnimAll.
Damage percent clamping used explicit branch bounds at 0 and 0x3E7 rather than a CLAMP macro in the excerpt.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ifStatus_802F5B48 stamina and non-stamina damage_percent bound checks

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Matched code increased to 69.23% (+0.04%, +1664 bytes). Four new matches were reported: ifStatus_802F4B84, ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F6EA4, and ifStatus_802F6508.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: The report also listed two broken matches: mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter and ifStatus_802F7134, plus one unmatched .sdata2 regression in main/melee/if/ifstatus.
No human review comments or review bodies are present in the loaded slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Record regressions alongside new matches in matching PRs
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2537's bot report shows 4 new ifstatus matches and +1664 matched bytes, but also two broken matches and one .sdata2 regression. Curated records for matching PRs should preserve both sides of the report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed HUD/HSD structures made ifstatus progress reviewable
accepted_candidate_records.text: The recovered ifstatus code uses IfDamageState, HudIndex, HSD_GObj, HSD_JObj, HSD_TObj, and HSD_MObj fields/helpers for damage digits, animation setup, and object creation, supporting the typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard in this subsystem.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: IfDamageState field accesses in ifStatus_802F4B84/4EDC/5B48/5EC0
diff_excerpt: HSD helper calls in ifStatus_802F5EC0 and ifStatus_802F61FC

source_update_candidates.title: ifstatus.c owns HUD percent/damage digit animation and shake behavior
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/if/ifstatus.c contains HUD damage percent update paths using IfDamageState/HudIndex, digit JObjs for Ones/Tens/Hundreds/Percent, HSD_TObj texture animation setup, JObj hide/show flags, and damage shake via frames_of_shake_remaining.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level context for future ifstatus HUD work; should be curator-reviewed because the loaded diff is truncated.

source_update_candidates.title: ifstatus header/type changes accompanied recovered function signatures
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2537 changed src/melee/if/ifstatus.h and src/melee/if/types.h while recovering ifstatus functions whose C definitions now take HSD_GObj*, IfDamageState*, and player index parameters.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ifStatus_802F5B48(HSD_GObj*), ifStatus_802F5EC0(IfDamageState*, s32), ifStatus_802F61FC(IfDamageState*, s32)
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact about prototype/type ownership; exact header diff should be checked before source promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Track unresolved PR 2537 regression terms
source_update_candidates.text: The bot report for PR 2537 listed broken matches in mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter and ifStatus_802F7134 plus an ifstatus .sdata2 regression. These may be useful as historical search terms if later fixes mention PR 2537.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: broken matches and .sdata2 regression
source_update_candidates.reason: Do not treat as unresolved current defects without later evidence; curate only as historical intake/search metadata.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every implemented function in the truncated diff fully matched; only ifStatus_802F4B84, ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F6EA4, and ifStatus_802F6508 are bot-reported as new 100% matches.
Do not promote field names with unk prefixes to semantic naming lessons; the slice shows they remain uncertain.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; the loaded slice has no human review comments.
Do not treat PAD_STACK usage here as a general style endorsement without objdiff/build details beyond the bot report.
